# CWE-1389 negative: explicit base-10 parsing (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1389-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1389 mitigated: ParseInt with base 10 rejects octal and hex prefixes.

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
)

func ReserveSeatsSafePure(db *sql.DB) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		raw := r.URL.Query().Get("count")
		seats, err := strconv.ParseInt(raw, 10, 64)
		if err != nil || seats <= 0 {
			http.Error(w, "invalid count", http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		showID := r.URL.Query().Get("show")
		_, err = db.Exec(
			"UPDATE shows SET reserved = reserved + $1 WHERE id = $2", seats, showID,
		)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Write([]byte(`{"reserved":true}`))
	}
}
